display_information.name: Retro Recap App
display_information.description: Collect sprint retrospective feedback from your team
display_information.long_description: Retro Recap App makes it easy to run team retrospectives directly in Slack. Use the global shortcut or App Home button to open an interactive form where teammates share what went well, what didn't, and action items for the next sprint. Responses are compiled into a rich summary posted to your retro channel — complete with mood tracking, focus area tags, and threaded comments for follow-up discussion.

shortcuts.name: Start Retrospective
shortcuts.description: Open a retrospective form to collect team feedback
